predictions.source_quote: we have upgraded our global growth forecast for 2018 to 3.3% from a previous estimate of 3.0%
we have raised our US and eurozone projections from 2% to 2.5%, and from 2% to 2.3%, respectively

in the emerging world we raise our growth forecast to 4.9% (previously 4.8%)

We forecast inflation at 2.3% in 2018 (up from 2.2%)
The Fed funds rate is now forecast to end 2017 at 1.5%, 2018 at 2.25% and 2019 at 2.5%
